title: Microsoft Teams Experiences Outage in Asia-Pacific Region
description: Microsoft Teams faced an outage affecting users in the Asia-Pacific region, with the issue now mitigated according to Microsoft.

sources.title: Microsoft says Teams outage across Asia-Pacific now 'mitigated'
sources.source: ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation

sources.title: Microsoft 365 outage affects Teams, SharePoint and other services
Microsoft Azure outage at West US region causes intermittent connectivity failures

sections.heading: Outage Details
paragraphs: Microsoft Teams experienced an outage affecting users in the Asia-Pacific region, as reported by ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation. The issue has been mitigated, ensuring service continuity for users.

sections.heading: Services Affected
paragraphs: According to BleepingComputer, the Microsoft 365 outage impacted not only Teams but also SharePoint and other services, causing disruptions for users relying on these platforms.

sections.heading: Azure Outage
paragraphs: Data Center Dynamics reported that a Microsoft Azure outage in the West US region led to intermittent connectivity failures, potentially contributing to the broader service disruption.

faq.q: What was the impact of the Teams outage?
faq.a: The Teams outage affected users in the Asia-Pacific region, disrupting services and causing connectivity issues.

faq.q: Which other services were affected by the Microsoft 365 outage?
faq.a: In addition to Teams, SharePoint and other services were impacted by the Microsoft 365 outage, as reported by BleepingComputer.

faq.q: How has Microsoft addressed the issue?
faq.a: Microsoft has mitigated the Teams outage, ensuring that services are restored for users in the affected region.

news_coverage.title: Microsoft says Teams outage across Asia-Pacific now 'mitigated'
news_coverage.source: ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
